meaning: n. 小船 v. 划船
example: The boat moved slowly across the lake.
exampleChinese: 那只小船慢慢地穿过湖面。

meaning: n. 组 adj. 群的 v. 聚合
example: Our group meets after school every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们小组每周五放学后见面。

meaning: num. 十九
example: She is nineteen years old this year.
exampleChinese: 她今年十九岁。

meaning: n. 政党，党派 v. 参加社交聚会
example: He joined a new party last year.
exampleChinese: 他去年加入了一个新政党。

meaning: n. 结婚
example: Their marriage began in a small town church.
exampleChinese: 他们的婚姻始于小镇的一座教堂。

meaning: adj. 清洁的，干净的 v. 使干净 adv. 完全地
example: Please keep your desk clean.
exampleChinese: 请保持你的书桌干净。

meaning: n. 瓶子 v. 控制
example: She filled the bottle with water.
exampleChinese: 她把瓶子装满了水。

meaning: n. 尾巴 v. 尾随 adj. 从后面而来的
example: The dog wagged its tail.
exampleChinese: 那只狗摇了摇尾巴。

meaning: adj. 恰好是，正是 adv. 非常，很
example: This is the very book I wanted.
exampleChinese: 这正是我想要的那本书。

meaning: n. 袋 v. 猎获
example: I put my lunch in my bag.
exampleChinese: 我把午饭放进我的包里。

meaning: n. 星期二
example: We have art class on Tuesday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期二有美术课。

meaning: v. 取消
example: They may cancel the game because of rain.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨，他们可能会取消比赛。

meaning: v. 映射 n. 地图
example: I opened the map on my phone.
exampleChinese: 我在手机上打开了地图。

meaning: n. 祖父母
example: Each grandparent told a story at dinner.
exampleChinese: 每位祖父母都在晚饭时讲了一个故事。

meaning: n. 月亮 v. 闲荡
example: The moon looks bright tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚的月亮看起来很明亮。

meaning: v. 是
example: This book will be useful for class.
exampleChinese: 这本书对上课会有用。

meaning: n. 美洲（包括北美和南美洲）
example: America has many different climates.
exampleChinese: 美洲有很多不同的气候。

meaning: n. 需要，要求 v. 需要
example: I need a pencil for the test.
exampleChinese: 考试时我需要一支铅笔。

meaning: adj. 新的，新鲜的 adv. 新近
example: She bought a new backpack yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天买了一个新书包。

meaning: n. 邮票 v. 铭记
example: I put a stamp on the envelope.
exampleChinese: 我在信封上贴了一张邮票。

meaning: prep. 没有 adv. 户外 n. 外部
example: He left without his umbrella.
exampleChinese: 他没带伞就离开了。

meaning: n. 核心 adj. 快的 adv. 迅速地，快
example: We took a quick walk after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们快步走了一会儿。

meaning: n. 玩笑，笑话 v. 开…的玩笑
example: That joke made the whole class laugh.
exampleChinese: 那个笑话把全班都逗笑了。

meaning: n. 桌子 v. 制表 adj. 桌子的
example: The cups are on the table.
exampleChinese: 杯子在桌子上。

meaning: pron. 它的
example: The cat cleaned its paws.
exampleChinese: 那只猫清理了它的爪子。

meaning: v. 检查，核对 n. <美>支票
example: Please check your answer again.
exampleChinese: 请再检查一遍你的答案。

meaning: n. 长颈鹿
example: The giraffe is eating leaves.
exampleChinese: 长颈鹿正在吃树叶。

meaning: n. 照片，图画 v. 画
example: She drew a picture of her house.
exampleChinese: 她画了一张自己房子的图画。

meaning: v. 吻
example: The baby tried to kiss her mother.
exampleChinese: 那个宝宝试着亲吻她的妈妈。

meaning: adj. 几个的 pron. 几个
example: Several students stayed after class.
exampleChinese: 几个学生课后留了下来。

meaning: n. 监视器 v. 监控
example: I use a large monitor for online classes.
exampleChinese: 我用一台大监视器上网课。

meaning: n. 文化，文明 v. 培养（等于cultivate）
example: Our school celebrates local culture every spring.
exampleChinese: 我们学校每年春天都会庆祝当地文化。

meaning: v. 乘出租车 n. 出租汽车
example: We took a taxi to the train station.
exampleChinese: 我们乘出租车去了火车站。

meaning: n. 健康
example: Fresh air and sleep are important for health.
exampleChinese: 新鲜空气和睡眠对健康很重要。

meaning: n. 对话 vt. 用对话表达
example: The dialogue in the play sounded natural.
exampleChinese: 这部戏里的对话听起来很自然。

meaning: adj. 最近的
example: Her recent trip to Beijing was exciting.
exampleChinese: 她最近的北京之行很令人兴奋。

meaning: num. 十个，十
example: There are ten apples in the basket.
exampleChinese: 篮子里有十个苹果。

meaning: n. 蓝色 adj. 蓝色的 v. 把…染成蓝色
example: She wore a blue dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条蓝色连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: adj. 黑暗的，深色的 n. 黑暗
example: It gets dark early in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天黑得很早。

meaning: n. 命令
example: The captain gave the order to move.
exampleChinese: 队长下令移动。

meaning: n. 蛋 v. 煽动
example: I ate a boiled egg for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐吃了一个煮鸡蛋。

meaning: n. 感觉，触觉 adj. 有感觉的 v. 感觉
example: I had a strange feeling before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前我有一种奇怪的感觉。

meaning: prep. 在（表示存在或出现的地点、场所、位置、空间） n. 阿特（老挝货币基本单位att） abbr. 密封的（airtight）
example: She is waiting at the bus stop.
exampleChinese: 她正在公交车站等候。

meaning: conj. （表条件）如果 n. 条件
example: If it rains, we will stay inside.
exampleChinese: 如果下雨，我们就待在室内。

meaning: n. 块 v. 修补
example: He took a piece of cake from the plate.
exampleChinese: 他从盘子里拿了一块蛋糕。

meaning: n. 男孩，男人 pron. 他
example: He is my new classmate.
exampleChinese: 他是我的新同学。

meaning: adj. 直接的 v. 管理 adv. 直接地
example: This is the most direct way home.
exampleChinese: 这是回家最直接的路。

meaning: n. 鼠 v. 捕鼠
example: A rat ran across the old yard.
exampleChinese: 一只老鼠跑过了旧院子。

meaning: n. 兄弟 int. 我的老兄！
example: My brother helps me with math homework.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥帮我做数学作业。

meaning: n. 地理
example: Geography helps us understand the world map.
exampleChinese: 地理帮助我们理解世界地图。

meaning: v. 建议
example: I advise you to check your answer again.
exampleChinese: 我建议你再检查一遍答案。

meaning: n. 印刷业 v. 印刷
example: This shop can print our class photos.
exampleChinese: 这家店可以印刷我们班的照片。

meaning: n. 节日 adj. 节日的，喜庆的
example: The Spring Festival is my favorite holiday.
exampleChinese: 春节是我最喜欢的节日。

meaning: adv. 一起 prep. 沿着
example: We walked along the river after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们沿着河边散步。

meaning: v. 植树于 n. 森林
example: A small path goes through the forest.
exampleChinese: 一条小路穿过森林。

meaning: n. 苹果，苹果树，苹果似的东西
example: She put an apple in her school bag.
exampleChinese: 她把一个苹果放进书包里。

meaning: n. 色拉
example: I made a salad with tomatoes and eggs.
exampleChinese: 我用西红柿和鸡蛋做了一份色拉。

meaning: n. 兔子 v. 让…见鬼去吧
example: The rabbit is eating a carrot.
exampleChinese: 这只兔子正在吃胡萝卜。

meaning: pron. 我们（主格）
example: We have a math test this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上我们有一场数学考试。

meaning: pron. 你（们）的东西 adj. 你（们）的（东西）
example: This blue pen is yours.
exampleChinese: 这支蓝色钢笔是你的。

meaning: n. 商店 v. 购物
example: My aunt owns a flower shop near the school.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈在学校附近开了一家花店。

meaning: pron. 他们的
example: Our seats are here, and theirs are by the window.
exampleChinese: 我们的座位在这里，他们的在窗边。

meaning: adj. 潮湿的 n. 雨天 v. 弄湿
example: My shoes got wet in the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的鞋在雨里淋湿了。

meaning: v. 呼喊
example: Please do not shout in the library.
exampleChinese: 请不要在图书馆里大声喊叫。

meaning: n. (女士)手提袋 v. （嘴巴）皱起，使缩拢
example: She kept her phone in her purse.
exampleChinese: 她把手机放在手提袋里。

meaning: adj. 现代的，近代的 n. 现代人
example: The library has a modern design.
exampleChinese: 这座图书馆有现代的设计。

meaning: v. 表达 adj. 明确的 n. 快车，快递，专使
example: It is hard to express my feelings in English.
exampleChinese: 用英语表达我的感受很难。

meaning: n. 黑板
example: The teacher wrote the homework on the blackboard.
exampleChinese: 老师把作业写在黑板上。

meaning: n. 仆人，佣人
example: The old servant opened the front door quietly.
exampleChinese: 那位老仆人轻轻地打开了前门。

meaning: n. 嗜好
example: My hobby is collecting stamps.
exampleChinese: 我的嗜好是收集邮票。

meaning: n. 冬季 v. 过冬 adj. 冬天的
example: Winter is very cold here.
exampleChinese: 这里的冬季很冷。

meaning: n. 工厂，车间 v. 种植
example: We plant tomatoes in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我们在春天种西红柿。

meaning: adj. 巨大的
example: They live in a huge house.
exampleChinese: 他们住在一座大房子里。

meaning: adj. 高的 adv. 夸大地
example: That tall tree is over the roof.
exampleChinese: 那棵高大的树比屋顶还高。

meaning: adj. 富有的
example: He is rich, but he lives simply.
exampleChinese: 他很富有，但生活很朴素。

meaning: v. 使喜欢 int. 请（礼貌用语）
example: Please close the window.
exampleChinese: 请把窗户关上。

meaning: v. 油漆
example: We need to paint the door white.
exampleChinese: 我们需要把门漆成白色。

meaning: n. 商业
example: Her family runs a small business.
exampleChinese: 她家经营一家小生意。

meaning: adv. 已经，早已
example: I have already finished my homework.
exampleChinese: 我已经完成作业了。

meaning: adj. 勇敢的 v. 勇敢地面对 n. 勇士
example: The brave girl spoke up first.
exampleChinese: 那个勇敢的女孩第一个发言。

meaning: v. 继续，延续
example: Please continue your story.
exampleChinese: 请继续讲你的故事。

meaning: n. 猫，猫科动物
example: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.
exampleChinese: 那只猫正在沙发上睡觉。

meaning: v. 发现
example: We may discover a better way.
exampleChinese: 我们可能会发现一个更好的办法。

meaning: n. 焦炭 v. 焦化
example: The factory uses coke as fuel.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂用焦炭作燃料。

meaning: v. 转动，使旋转 n. 转弯
example: Turn the key slowly.
exampleChinese: 慢慢转动钥匙。

meaning: v. 蒸，散发 n. 蒸汽 adj. 蒸汽的
example: Steam rose from the hot soup.
exampleChinese: 热汤冒出了蒸汽。

meaning: n. 视频 adj. 视频的 v. 录制
example: I watched a short video online.
exampleChinese: 我在网上看了一个短视频。

meaning: adj. 愚蠢的 n. 傻瓜
example: It was stupid to leave my bag there.
exampleChinese: 把我的包落在那里真是太愚蠢了。

meaning: pron. 任何事
example: Did you buy anything at the store?
exampleChinese: 你在商店买了什么东西吗？

meaning: n. 交谈，会话
example: We had a long conversation after class.
exampleChinese: 我们课后进行了一次长谈。

meaning: n. 部分 v. 分离 adv. 部分地
example: This part of the book is easy to understand.
exampleChinese: 这本书的这一部分很容易理解。

meaning: n. 门
example: Please close the door before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把门关上。

meaning: adj. 睡着的 adv. 熟睡地
example: The baby is asleep in the car.
exampleChinese: 宝宝在车里睡着了。

meaning: n. 和平
example: Everyone hopes for peace in the world.
exampleChinese: 每个人都希望世界和平。

meaning: adj. 单一的 n. 一个 v. 选出
example: A single tree stood in the field.
exampleChinese: 田野里孤零零地立着一棵树。

meaning: v. 证明
example: Can you prove that this answer is correct?
exampleChinese: 你能证明这个答案是正确的吗？

meaning: n. 步行，走 v. 散步
example: We took a short walk after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们散了一会儿步。

meaning: v. 搜寻
example: The police search the area at night.
exampleChinese: 警察在夜里搜寻这个地区。

meaning: n. 棉花 v. 一致 adj. 棉的
example: She wore a soft cotton shirt.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件柔软的棉衬衫。

meaning: n. 胃 v. 忍受
example: My stomach hurts after eating too much.
exampleChinese: 吃太多后我的胃疼。

meaning: adj. 共同的 n. 普通
example: This is a common mistake for new students.
exampleChinese: 这对新学生来说是一个常见错误。

meaning: v. 叫喊
example: I heard someone cry for help outside.
exampleChinese: 我听见外面有人大声呼救。

meaning: adv. 有时
example: I sometimes read in the library after school.
exampleChinese: 我有时放学后在图书馆看书。

meaning: n. 家乡 adj. 家乡的
example: My hometown is famous for its old bridges.
exampleChinese: 我的家乡因古老的桥而闻名。

meaning: n. 标准 adj. 标准的
example: This product meets the safety standard.
exampleChinese: 这个产品符合安全标准。

meaning: adj. 下雪的，多雪的
example: It was a snowy morning in January.
exampleChinese: 那是一个一月的下雪早晨。

meaning: n. 座位 v. 使…坐下
example: Is this seat taken?
exampleChinese: 这个座位有人吗？

meaning: v. 击鼓 n. 鼓
example: They drum on the table with their fingers.
exampleChinese: 他们用手指在桌子上敲击。

meaning: n. 首都，省会 adj. 首都的
example: Beijing is the capital of China.
exampleChinese: 北京是中国的首都。

meaning: n. 军官，警官 v. 指挥
example: The officer checked our IDs at the gate.
exampleChinese: 那位警官在门口检查了我们的证件。

meaning: n. 裙子 v. 绕过，回避
example: She wore a blue skirt to school.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条蓝色裙子去上学。

meaning: v. 运送，乘船 n. 船
example: We ship the books every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们每周五运送这些书。

meaning: n. 歌曲
example: This song makes me feel happy.
exampleChinese: 这首歌曲让我感到快乐。

meaning: n. 特使，特派人员 adj. 特别的
example: Today is a special day for our class.
exampleChinese: 今天对我们班来说是特别的一天。

meaning: n. 绳，绳索 v. 捆，绑
example: Please tie the box with a rope.
exampleChinese: 请用绳子把这个箱子绑好。

meaning: v. 收集 adv. 由收件人付款地 adj. 由收件人付款的
example: I collect stamps from different countries.
exampleChinese: 我收集来自不同国家的邮票。

meaning: n. 音乐会 v. 使协调 adj. 音乐会用的
example: We went to a concert in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们去公园听了一场音乐会。

meaning: v. 欺骗 n. 狐狸
example: The fox ran across the field.
exampleChinese: 那只狐狸跑过了田野。

meaning: v. 以…为中心 n. 中心 adj. 中央的
example: The town centre is busy on weekends.
exampleChinese: 市中心在周末很热闹。

meaning: n. 奶牛，母牛 v. 威胁
example: The cow is eating grass by the fence.
exampleChinese: 那头奶牛正在栅栏旁吃草。

meaning: n. 学生
example: Each pupil has a desk in the classroom.
exampleChinese: 每个学生在教室里都有一张课桌。

meaning: adv. 几乎不，简直不
example: I hardly know anyone at the new school.
exampleChinese: 在这所新学校里我几乎谁都不认识。

meaning: n. 蛋糕 v. 使结块
example: We had chocolate cake after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们吃了巧克力蛋糕。

meaning: adj. 流行的，通俗的
example: That singer is very popular with teenagers.
exampleChinese: 那位歌手很受青少年欢迎。

meaning: v. 欺骗 n. 欺骗，作弊
example: Do not cheat in the exam.
exampleChinese: 考试时不要作弊。

meaning: n. 驾驶员
example: The bus driver stopped at the corner.
exampleChinese: 公交车司机在拐角处停了下来。

meaning: v. 管理
example: She can manage a small shop by herself.
exampleChinese: 她能独自管理一家小商店。

meaning: v. 涂黄油于 n. 黄油
example: Please butter the bread for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 请给早餐的面包涂上黄油。

meaning: v. 煽动 n. 迷
example: My sister is a big fan of that actor.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是那位演员的忠实粉丝。

meaning: n. 高地
example: From that height, we could see the whole lake.
exampleChinese: 从那个高地上，我们能看见整个湖。

meaning: v. 复述
example: Please retell the story in your own words.
exampleChinese: 请用你自己的话复述这个故事。

meaning: n. 欧洲
example: My aunt lives in Europe now.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈现在住在欧洲。

meaning: n. 假日 v. 外出度假
example: We will visit my grandparents during the holiday.
exampleChinese: 假日期间我们要去看望祖父母。

meaning: n. 小孩 v. 欺骗 adj. 小山羊皮制的
example: The kid is drawing a cat on the wall.
exampleChinese: 那个小孩正在墙上画一只猫。

meaning: adv. 差不多，几乎
example: I am nearly ready to leave.
exampleChinese: 我差不多准备好要出发了。

meaning: adv. 在哪里 pron. 哪里 conj. 在…的地方
example: Do you know where my glasses are?
exampleChinese: 你知道我的眼镜在哪里吗？

meaning: adj. 慢的 v. 变慢 adv. 慢慢地
example: The bus is too slow this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上的公交车太慢了。

meaning: adj. 任何的 pron. 任何 adv. 稍微
example: You can choose any seat in the room.
exampleChinese: 你可以选房间里的任何座位。

meaning: n. 前面 v. 面对 adj. 前面的
example: There is a small shop at the front of the school.
exampleChinese: 学校前面有一家小商店。

meaning: prep. 超过 adv. 在上面 adj. 上文的
example: The picture hangs above my desk.
exampleChinese: 那幅画挂在我书桌上方。

meaning: adj. 顺利的 v. 使光滑 n. 平滑部分
example: The road was smooth after the repair.
exampleChinese: 修好以后，这条路变得很平整。

meaning: n. 飞机
example: The airplane landed safely in the rain.
exampleChinese: 飞机在雨中安全降落了。

meaning: n. 选择 adj. 精选的
example: It was a hard choice between the two books.
exampleChinese: 在这两本书之间做选择很难。

meaning: adj. 活的 v. 经历
example: Many fish cannot live out of water.
exampleChinese: 许多鱼离开水就不能存活。

meaning: n. 死
example: The old king's death changed the country.
exampleChinese: 老国王的去世改变了这个国家。

meaning: n. 六月
example: Our summer trip starts in June.
exampleChinese: 我们的暑假旅行从六月开始。

meaning: n. 十七 adj. 十七岁的
example: My sister is seventeen this year.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐今年十七岁。

meaning: adj. 自然的 n. 自然的事情
example: Her smile looks natural in the photo.
exampleChinese: 她在照片里的笑容看起来很自然。

meaning: n. 星期三
example: We have a music class on Wednesday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期三有一节音乐课。

meaning: n. 边缘 v. 使锐利
example: Be careful near the edge of the roof.
exampleChinese: 在屋顶边缘附近要小心。

meaning: pron. 她（she的宾格） adj. 她的
example: I saw her at the library after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我在图书馆看见了她。

meaning: n. 警察，警方 v. 监督 adj. 警察的
example: The police arrived a few minutes later.
exampleChinese: 几分钟后警察到了。

meaning: n. 小麦
example: The farmers grow wheat in this field.
exampleChinese: 农民们在这块地里种小麦。

meaning: pron. 他们
example: They play basketball every Saturday.
exampleChinese: 他们每个星期六都打篮球。

meaning: n. 四十 adj. 四十的
example: There are forty students in my class.
exampleChinese: 我们班有四十名学生。

meaning: n. 周，星期
example: I visit my grandparents every week.
exampleChinese: 我每周都去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: n. 父亲（或母亲）
example: Each parent signed the school notice.
exampleChinese: 每位家长都在学校通知上签了字。

meaning: n. 咳嗽，咳嗽声 v. 咳出
example: He has a bad cough this morning.
exampleChinese: 他今天早上咳嗽得很厉害。

meaning: n. 大门 v. 给…装大门
example: Please close the gate before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把大门关上。

meaning: n. 母亲 v. 生下 adj. 母亲的
example: My mother makes soup for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭做汤。

meaning: n. 声音 v. 表达
example: Her voice is calm and clear.
exampleChinese: 她的声音平静而清晰。

meaning: adj. 重要的，重大的
example: It is important to get enough sleep.
exampleChinese: 保证充足睡眠很重要。

meaning: n. 最拥挤部分 adj. 厚的 adv. 密集地
example: This book is quite thick.
exampleChinese: 这本书相当厚。

meaning: n. 旅行者 adj. 旅游的 vt. 在旅行参观
example: The tourist took photos of the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 那位游客拍了那座老桥的照片。

meaning: n. 垃圾，废物 adj. 毫无价值的
example: Please throw the rubbish in the bin.
exampleChinese: 请把垃圾扔进垃圾桶里。

meaning: v. 准备
example: We need to prepare for the test.
exampleChinese: 我们需要为考试做准备。

meaning: n. 住宅 v. 覆盖
example: Their house is near the river.
exampleChinese: 他们的房子在河边。

meaning: prep. 通过 adv. 彻底 adj. 直达的
example: We walked through the park at noon.
exampleChinese: 中午我们穿过了公园。

meaning: adj. 疯狂的 n. 狂怒
example: Dad was mad about the broken window.
exampleChinese: 爸爸因为窗户破了很生气。

meaning: n. 女王，王后 v. 使…成为女王或王后
example: The queen waved to the crowd.
exampleChinese: 女王向人群挥手。

meaning: n. 湖 vt. （使）血球溶解
example: We swam in the lake last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天我们在湖里游泳。

meaning: n. 数学（等于mathematics）
example: Math is my favorite subject.
exampleChinese: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 家，住宅 adv. 在家，回家 adj. 国内的，家庭的
example: I stayed home and read a book.
exampleChinese: 我待在家里看书。

meaning: adv. 常常
example: I often walk to school with my sister.
exampleChinese: 我常常和姐姐一起走路去学校。

meaning: n. 箱，盒子 v. 拳击
example: She put the old photos in a box.
exampleChinese: 她把旧照片放进一个盒子里。

meaning: v. 说 n. 谈话
example: We need to talk after class.
exampleChinese: 我们课后需要谈一谈。

meaning: n. 厨房
example: My mother is cooking in the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈正在厨房做饭。

meaning: v. 呼叫 n. 电话
example: Please call me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家时请给我打电话。

meaning: n. 蜜蜂，蜂
example: A bee landed on the yellow flower.
exampleChinese: 一只蜜蜂落在黄色的花上。

meaning: n. 千克
example: The bag of rice weighs one kilo.
exampleChinese: 这袋米重一千克。

meaning: n. 周期，期间 adj. 某一时代的
example: The rainy period lasted for three days.
exampleChinese: 这段下雨期持续了三天。

meaning: n. 蔬菜 adj. 蔬菜的
example: We grow vegetable plants in the yard.
exampleChinese: 我们在院子里种蔬菜。

meaning: v. 拉 n. 拉，拉绳
example: Pull the door gently, please.
exampleChinese: 请轻轻把门拉开。

meaning: n. 手套 vt. 给…戴手套
example: I lost one glove on the bus.
exampleChinese: 我把一只手套落在公交车上了。

meaning: pron. 你
example: I will help you with your homework.
exampleChinese: 我会帮你做作业。

meaning: n. 三月
example: My birthday is in March.
exampleChinese: 我的生日在三月。

meaning: v. 检查
example: The doctor will examine your eyes.
exampleChinese: 医生将检查你的眼睛。

meaning: n. 结果
example: The test result made him smile.
exampleChinese: 测试结果让他笑了。

meaning: n. 快乐 vt. 使高兴 vi. 高兴
example: It is a pleasure to work with you.
exampleChinese: 和你一起工作是一件愉快的事。

meaning: num. 四 adj. 四的
example: We saw four birds in the tree.
exampleChinese: 我们看见树上有四只鸟。

meaning: n. 先锋 v. 开辟
example: She was a pioneer in computer science.
exampleChinese: 她是计算机科学领域的先锋。

meaning: n. 信息，资料
example: I found useful information on the school website.
exampleChinese: 我在学校网站上找到了有用的信息。

meaning: n. 社会
example: Books can help us understand society better.
exampleChinese: 书籍能帮助我们更好地理解社会。

meaning: n. 比较 v. 比拟，喻为
example: It is hard to compare the two paintings.
exampleChinese: 很难比较这两幅画。

meaning: v. 提供
example: The school will provide free lunch today.
exampleChinese: 学校今天将提供免费午餐。

meaning: n. 所有者
example: The owner of the shop knows my father.
exampleChinese: 这家商店的所有者认识我父亲。

meaning: n. 太阳 v. 使晒
example: The sun was warm on my face.
exampleChinese: 太阳照在我脸上，暖洋洋的。

meaning: adv. 永远，一直
example: She always arrives early for class.
exampleChinese: 她上课总是到得很早。

meaning: n. 方法 adv. 大大地 adj. 途中的
example: This is a simple way to solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 这是解决这个问题的一个简单方法。

meaning: adv. 宁可，宁愿 int. 当然啦（回答问题时用）
example: I would rather stay home tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我宁愿待在家里。

meaning: v. 接受
example: He was happy to accept the gift.
exampleChinese: 他很高兴接受这份礼物。

meaning: v. 包括 n. 封面，封皮
example: This book will cover the history of China.
exampleChinese: 这本书将包括中国的历史。

meaning: n. 星期五
example: We have a music class on Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期五有一节音乐课。

meaning: n. 原因 v. 引起
example: Too much rain can cause flooding.
exampleChinese: 过多的雨水会引起洪水。

meaning: n. 访问者，参观者
example: Every visitor must sign their name here.
exampleChinese: 每位来访者都必须在这里签名。

meaning: adj. 威严的 n. 八月（简写为Aug）
example: My family will travel in August.
exampleChinese: 我家人将在八月旅行。

meaning: n. 报告
example: I finished my science report last night.
exampleChinese: 我昨晚完成了我的科学报告。

meaning: v. 借
example: Can I borrow your pencil for a minute?
exampleChinese: 我能借用一下你的铅笔吗？

meaning: adj. 遗憾的 int. 对不起
example: Sorry, I stepped on your foot.
exampleChinese: 对不起，我踩到你的脚了。

meaning: n. 城镇，市镇
example: My grandparents live in a small town.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母住在一个小镇上。

meaning: v. 连接
example: Please connect the printer to the computer.
exampleChinese: 请把打印机连接到电脑上。

meaning: adj. 甜的 n. 糖果
example: This tea is too sweet for me.
exampleChinese: 这杯茶对我来说太甜了。

meaning: n. 石头 adj. 石的 v. 向扔石块
example: The child picked up a stone by the river.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子在河边捡起一块石头。

meaning: pron. 任何人
example: Anyone can join the school club.
exampleChinese: 任何人都可以加入学校社团。

meaning: adv. 在这里 int. 嘿！ n. 这里
example: Please wait here for your teacher.
exampleChinese: 请在这里等你的老师。

meaning: n. 后面 v. 支持 adv. 以前
example: My grandparents moved back to the village.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母以前搬回了村子。

meaning: n. 糖 v. 加糖于
example: I take sugar in my coffee.
exampleChinese: 我喝咖啡时加糖。

meaning: n. 纸 adj. 纸做的 v. 用纸糊
example: She wrote her name on a piece of paper.
exampleChinese: 她把自己的名字写在一张纸上。

meaning: n. 国家，国土 adj. 祖国的，故乡的
example: China is a large country.
exampleChinese: 中国是一个大国。

meaning: n. 水果 v. 结果实
example: We bought fresh fruit at the market.
exampleChinese: 我们在市场买了新鲜水果。

meaning: n. 阿姨
example: My aunt makes delicious noodles.
exampleChinese: 我阿姨做的面条很好吃。

meaning: n. 一对 v. 把…组成一对
example: I need a new pair of shoes.
exampleChinese: 我需要一双新鞋。

meaning: adj. 忙碌的 v. 使忙于
example: She is busy with her homework.
exampleChinese: 她正忙着做作业。

meaning: n. 时间 v. 计时 adj. 定时的
example: We had a good time at the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园玩得很开心。

meaning: adj. 外国的
example: He likes to watch foreign films.
exampleChinese: 他喜欢看外国电影。

meaning: n. 囚犯，犯人
example: The story was about a prisoner who escaped.
exampleChinese: 这个故事讲的是一名逃跑的囚犯。

meaning: n. 叔叔
example: My uncle drives a bus in the city.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔在城里开公交车。

meaning: n. 笑
example: Her laugh filled the room.
exampleChinese: 她的笑声充满了整个房间。

meaning: adj. 英国人的 n. 英语 vt. 把…译成英语
example: English is my favorite subject at school.
exampleChinese: 英语是我在学校最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 农村，乡下
example: We spent the weekend in the countryside.
exampleChinese: 我们在乡下度过了周末。

meaning: adj. 伟大的，重大的 n. 大师
example: She is a great teacher.
exampleChinese: 她是一位伟大的老师。

meaning: abbr. 视频高密光盘（Video Compact Disc）
example: My grandpa still watches old movies on VCD.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷还用视频高密光盘看老电影。

meaning: adj. 凉爽的 v. 使…冷却 n. 凉爽
example: The evening air is cool after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后的傍晚空气很凉爽。

meaning: v. 夹入 n. 三明治
example: I ate a sandwich for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了一个三明治。

meaning: v. 出现
example: Stars appear in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 星星出现在夜空中。

meaning: v. 放松，休息
example: I like to relax with music after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我喜欢听音乐放松。

meaning: n. 大小 adj. 一定尺寸的 v. 依大小排列
example: What size shoes do you wear?
exampleChinese: 你穿多大码的鞋？

meaning: n. 椅子 v. 担任（会议的）主席
example: There is a chair by the window.
exampleChinese: 窗边有一把椅子。

meaning: n. 英格兰
example: My aunt lives in England.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈住在英格兰。

meaning: n. 明信片
example: She sent me a postcard from Beijing.
exampleChinese: 她从北京寄给我一张明信片。

meaning: n. 结束 v. 结束，终止
example: The movie will end at nine.
exampleChinese: 电影将在九点结束。

meaning: v. 躺 n. 谎言
example: I like to lie on the grass and read.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢躺在草地上看书。

meaning: adj. 第八的 num. 第八 n. 八分之一
example: Her birthday is on the eighth of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月八日。

meaning: adj. 多风的，有风的
example: It is too windy to fly a kite today.
exampleChinese: 今天风太大，不适合放风筝。

meaning: n. 注意力
example: Please pay attention to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 请注意听老师讲课。

meaning: v. 信任
example: I believe my best friend.
exampleChinese: 我信任我最好的朋友。

meaning: n. 邮件 v. 邮寄
example: I will mail the card tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天会把这张卡片寄出去。

meaning: n. 信 v. 写字母于
example: I got a letter from my cousin.
exampleChinese: 我收到了我表亲的一封信。

meaning: n. 大衣
example: He put on an overcoat before going out.
exampleChinese: 他出门前穿上了大衣。

meaning: n. 乐趣 adj. 供娱乐用的 vi. 开玩笑
example: Swimming in the lake is fun.
exampleChinese: 在湖里游泳很有乐趣。

meaning: adj. 突然的，意外的 n. 突然发生的事
example: A sudden rain made us run inside.
exampleChinese: 一场突然的雨让我们跑进了屋里。

meaning: n. 金，黄金 adj. 金的，金制的
example: She wears a gold ring every day.
exampleChinese: 她每天都戴着一枚金戒指。

meaning: n. 工程师 v. 设计
example: My sister is an engineer at a car company.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是一家汽车公司的工程师。

meaning: n. 键盘 v. 键入
example: I spilled juice on my keyboard.
exampleChinese: 我把果汁洒在了我的键盘上。

meaning: adv. 太
example: This bag is too heavy for me.
exampleChinese: 这个包对我来说太重了。

meaning: n. 怀疑
example: There is no doubt that he tried his best.
exampleChinese: 毫无疑问，他已经尽了全力。

meaning: adj. 外面的，外部的 n. 外部 adv. 在外面，向外面
example: The kids are playing outside now.
exampleChinese: 孩子们现在正在外面玩。

meaning: adj. 基本的 n. 基础
example: We learned the basic rules first.
exampleChinese: 我们先学了基本规则。

meaning: n. 呼吸，气息
example: Take a deep breath before you speak.
exampleChinese: 说话前先深呼吸。

meaning: n. 抽屉
example: The socks are in the top drawer.
exampleChinese: 袜子在最上面的抽屉里。

meaning: conj. 在…以前
example: Wait here until I come back.
exampleChinese: 你在这里等到我回来。

meaning: n. 旅客
example: Every passenger showed a ticket.
exampleChinese: 每位旅客都出示了车票。

meaning: n. （打字机等的）键 v. 键入 adj. 关键的
example: Trust is key to good teamwork.
exampleChinese: 信任是良好团队合作的关键。

meaning: v. 记得
example: Do you remember his name?
exampleChinese: 你记得他的名字吗？

meaning: v. 滑行 n. 海岸
example: We walked along the coast at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时我们沿着海岸散步。

meaning: n. 舌头 v. 舔
example: The doctor asked me to stick out my tongue.
exampleChinese: 医生让我把舌头伸出来。

meaning: n. 篮球
example: We play basketball after school.
exampleChinese: 我们放学后打篮球。

meaning: n. 骆驼 adj. 驼色的 vi. 工作刻板平庸
example: The camel carried water across the desert.
exampleChinese: 那只骆驼驮着水穿过沙漠。

meaning: n. 中文，汉语 adj. 中国的，中国人的
example: She is learning Chinese at school.
exampleChinese: 她正在学校学习中文。

meaning: v. 超速，加速 n. 速度，速率
example: Please slow down and do not speed.
exampleChinese: 请慢一点，不要超速。

meaning: n. 书包
example: My schoolbag is under the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的书包在桌子下面。

meaning: n. 步，脚步 v. 踏，踩
example: Please step back from the door.
exampleChinese: 请从门边往后退一步。

meaning: n. 雨伞
example: She took an umbrella because it was raining.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨，她带了一把雨伞。

meaning: n. 大学
example: My sister hopes to go to college next year.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐希望明年上大学。

meaning: v. 显示
example: These numbers show the result clearly.
exampleChinese: 这些数字清楚地显示了结果。

meaning: n. 时钟 v. 记录
example: There is a clock on the classroom wall.
exampleChinese: 教室的墙上有一个时钟。

meaning: n. 排球
example: We played volleyball after class.
exampleChinese: 我们下课后打了排球。

meaning: n. 发明
example: The wheel is an important invention.
exampleChinese: 轮子是一项重要的发明。

meaning: conj. 尽管
example: Although he was tired, he finished his homework.
exampleChinese: 尽管他很累，他还是完成了作业。

meaning: n. 咖啡
example: My dad drinks coffee every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸每天早上都喝咖啡。

meaning: n. 分
example: This candy costs fifty cent.
exampleChinese: 这块糖果值五十分。

meaning: adj. 紫色的 n. 紫色 v. 变成紫色
example: She wore a purple dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条紫色的连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: n. 电影 v. 在…上覆以薄膜
example: We watched a funny film last night.
exampleChinese: 我们昨晚看了一部有趣的电影。

meaning: n. 学校 v. 教育
example: Our school is near the park.
exampleChinese: 我们学校在公园附近。

meaning: adj. 有用的，有益的
example: This map is useful for visitors.
exampleChinese: 这张地图对游客很有用。

meaning: n. 盘 v. 盛于碟盘中
example: She put some fruit on a dish.
exampleChinese: 她把一些水果放在一个盘子里。

meaning: adv. 到处 n. 每个地方
example: I looked for my keys everywhere.
exampleChinese: 我到处找我的钥匙。

meaning: adj. 高兴的 vt. 使高兴
example: I am glad to see you again.
exampleChinese: 我很高兴再次见到你。

meaning: n. 九十 adj. 九十的
example: My grandfather is ninety years old.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷九十岁了。

meaning: n. 作文，作曲，作品
example: Our teacher asked us to write a composition about spring.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们写一篇关于春天的作文。

meaning: n. 翼 v. 使飞
example: The bird hurt its wing on the fence.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟的翅膀在篱笆上弄伤了。

meaning: n. 数 v. 计入
example: We number the pages from one to ten.
exampleChinese: 我们把页码从一编到十。

meaning: adj. 有礼貌的，客气的
example: She was polite to the new student.
exampleChinese: 她对新同学很有礼貌。

meaning: v. 解散
example: The teacher will dismiss the class at noon.
exampleChinese: 老师将在中午解散这堂课。

meaning: v. 修理 n. 医生
example: The doctor checked my temperature.
exampleChinese: 医生给我量了体温。

meaning: adj. 疲倦的 v. 疲倦
example: After the long walk, I felt tired.
exampleChinese: 走了很长一段路后，我觉得很疲倦。

meaning: n. 蜡笔 v. 以蜡笔作画
example: The child used a red crayon to draw a sun.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子用一支红色蜡笔画了一个太阳。

meaning: n. 兴趣，爱好 v. 使……感兴趣
example: Music can interest young children.
exampleChinese: 音乐可以使小孩子感兴趣。

meaning: adj. 极好的，精彩的，绝妙的
example: We had a wonderful time at the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园里玩得非常开心。

meaning: n. 矿，矿藏 v. 开采，采掘 pron. 我的
example: That blue backpack is mine.
exampleChinese: 那个蓝色背包是我的。

meaning: n. 风 v. 缠绕
example: The wind blew the leaves across the road.
exampleChinese: 风把树叶吹过了马路。

meaning: pron. 一个人 adj. 一的 n. 一
example: Only one was left in the box.
exampleChinese: 盒子里只剩下一个了。

meaning: n. 手臂 v. 武装起来
example: He raised his arm to ask a question.
exampleChinese: 他举起手臂来提问。

meaning: v. 不计 prep. 除…之外 conj. 除了
example: Everyone came except Tom.
exampleChinese: 除了汤姆，大家都来了。

meaning: n. 信任，信赖
example: Trust is important in a friendship.
exampleChinese: 信任在友谊中很重要。

meaning: n. 长时间 adj. 长的 v. 渴望
example: I long to see my grandparents again.
exampleChinese: 我渴望再次见到我的祖父母。

meaning: adj. 其他的 pron. 另外一个
example: One shoe is black, and the other is brown.
exampleChinese: 一只鞋是黑色的，另一只是棕色的。

meaning: n. 十二个 adj. 一打的
example: She bought a dozen eggs at the store.
exampleChinese: 她在商店买了一打鸡蛋。

meaning: n. 害怕
example: His fear of dogs slowly faded.
exampleChinese: 他对狗的害怕慢慢消失了。

meaning: conj. 因为 prep. 如同 adv. 同样地
example: As it was raining, we stayed inside.
exampleChinese: 因为在下雨，我们待在室内。

meaning: prep. 在…之前 adv. 以前 conj. 在…以前
example: Wash your hands before dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭前要洗手。

meaning: n. 溪流 v. 流
example: A clear stream runs behind the village.
exampleChinese: 一条清澈的小溪流经村后。

meaning: adv. 后来 prep. 在……之后 adj. 以后的
example: We went home soon after the game.
exampleChinese: 比赛后不久我们就回家了。

meaning: v. 使固定 n. 困境
example: Can you fix this broken chair?
exampleChinese: 你能修好这把坏椅子吗？

meaning: n. 行为
example: Good behaviour is important at school.
exampleChinese: 在学校里，良好的行为很重要。

meaning: n. 房间 v. 为…提供住处
example: She cleaned her room this morning.
exampleChinese: 她今天早上打扫了她的房间。

meaning: v. 打扰
example: Please do not disturb my little brother.
exampleChinese: 请不要打扰我弟弟。

meaning: adj. 俄国的 n. 俄语
example: She is learning Russian at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学学习俄语。

meaning: v. 微笑
example: Babies often smile when they see their mothers.
exampleChinese: 婴儿看见妈妈时常常会微笑。

meaning: adj. 严格的
example: Our math teacher is strict but fair.
exampleChinese: 我们的数学老师很严格，但很公平。

meaning: n. 国王 vi. 统治 vt. 立…为王
example: The king lived in a large stone castle.
exampleChinese: 国王住在一座巨大的石头城堡里。

meaning: n. 通讯， 通信
example: Good communication helps a team work well.
exampleChinese: 良好的沟通能帮助团队顺利合作。

meaning: n. 牙膏
example: I need a new tube of toothpaste.
exampleChinese: 我需要一管新的牙膏。

meaning: pron. 他的
example: That blue bicycle is his.
exampleChinese: 那辆蓝色自行车是他的。

meaning: n. 值 v. 评价
example: The value of this old coin is high.
exampleChinese: 这枚旧硬币的价值很高。

meaning: v. 成功
example: If we keep trying, we will succeed.
exampleChinese: 如果我们继续努力，我们就会成功。

meaning: n. 餐馆
example: We had lunch at a small restaurant.
exampleChinese: 我们在一家小餐馆吃了午饭。

meaning: n. 能力，能耐
example: Her ability to draw surprised us.
exampleChinese: 她的绘画能力让我们很惊讶。

meaning: n. 匙，勺子 v. 用匙舀
example: Use a spoon to eat the soup.
exampleChinese: 用勺子喝汤。

meaning: n. 脸 v. 向
example: The windows face the park.
exampleChinese: 这些窗户朝向公园。

meaning: n. 鞋 v. 给……穿上鞋
example: I need a new shoe for gym class.
exampleChinese: 我上体育课需要一只新鞋。

meaning: adj. 大的 adv. 大量地
example: They live in a big house near the park.
exampleChinese: 他们住在公园附近的一所大房子里。

meaning: v. 生产 n. 农产品
example: This farm can produce fresh milk every day.
exampleChinese: 这个农场每天都能生产新鲜牛奶。

meaning: n. 岛 adj. 岛的 vt. 孤立
example: The small island is full of birds.
exampleChinese: 这座小岛上满是鸟。

meaning: adj. 沉重的 n. 重物 adv. 大量地
example: This box is too heavy for me to lift.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子太重了，我搬不起来。

meaning: adj. 电的 n. 电
example: My family uses an electric stove at home.
exampleChinese: 我家在家里使用电炉。

meaning: n. 行星
example: Mars is the fourth planet from the sun.
exampleChinese: 火星是离太阳第四近的行星。

meaning: n. 天气 v. 经受住 adj. 露天的
example: The weather is warm and sunny today.
exampleChinese: 今天天气温暖又晴朗。

meaning: n. 客人，宾客 v. 款待 adj. 客人的
example: We made tea for our guest.
exampleChinese: 我们给客人泡了茶。

meaning: pron. 谁（who的宾格）
example: To whom did you send the email?
exampleChinese: 你把这封电子邮件发给谁了？

meaning: adj. 努力的 adv. 努力地
example: She studies hard before every test.
exampleChinese: 她每次考试前都努力学习。

meaning: v. 鼓掌，拍手 n. 鼓掌
example: Please clap for the school band.
exampleChinese: 请为学校乐队鼓掌。

meaning: v. 取来 n. 取得
example: Can you fetch my notebook from the desk?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我把我的笔记本从书桌上取来吗？

meaning: adj. 每 adv. 每个
example: Each student got a library card.
exampleChinese: 每个学生都拿到了一张借书证。

meaning: n. 希望 v. 祝愿
example: I wish you a happy birthday.
exampleChinese: 祝你生日快乐。

meaning: n. 环境
example: We should protect the environment together.
exampleChinese: 我们应该一起保护环境。

meaning: adj. 害羞的 v. 投 n. 投掷
example: The shy girl spoke very softly.
exampleChinese: 那个害羞的女孩说话声音很轻。

meaning: v. 谋杀
example: The story is about a detective solving a murder case.
exampleChinese: 这个故事是关于一名侦探侦破一起谋杀案的。

meaning: v. 给予，提供
example: This job can afford us more chances to learn.
exampleChinese: 这份工作能给我们提供更多学习的机会。

meaning: adv. 表示否定，不 n. “非”（计算机中逻辑运算的一种）
example: I am not ready to leave yet.
exampleChinese: 我还没准备好离开。

meaning: aux. 必须，一定 n. 绝对必要的事物
example: You must finish your homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 你必须在晚饭前完成作业。

meaning: n. 敌人，仇敌 adj. 敌人的
example: The two countries were once enemy states.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家曾经是敌对国家。

meaning: n. 自豪 v. 使得意
example: She felt pride when her team won the game.
exampleChinese: 当她的队赢得比赛时，她感到自豪。

meaning: n. 烟 v. 冒烟，吸烟
example: Smoke came out of the kitchen window.
exampleChinese: 烟从厨房窗户里冒出来。

meaning: v. 扮演 n. 行为，行动
example: Please act like an adult in class.
exampleChinese: 请在课堂上表现得像个大人。

meaning: adv. 在地下 adj. 地下的 n. 地下
example: The train goes underground after this station.
exampleChinese: 火车过了这一站后就在地下行驶。

meaning: v. 露营
example: We plan to camp by the lake tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们打算今晚在湖边露营。

meaning: adj. 全部的 v. 总数达 n. 总数
example: The total cost was fifty dollars.
exampleChinese: 总费用是五十美元。

meaning: n. 羽绒滑雪衫 v. 给…穿夹克
example: He zipped up his jacket before going outside.
exampleChinese: 他出门前拉上了夹克的拉链。

meaning: v. 演说 n. 地址
example: Please write your address on this form.
exampleChinese: 请把你的地址写在这张表上。

meaning: n. 北，北方 adj. 北方的 adv. 在北方
example: Birds fly north in spring.
exampleChinese: 鸟在春天向北飞。

meaning: v. 观察 n. 手表
example: I like to watch the rain from my window.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢从窗边看雨。

meaning: n. 书籍 v. 预订
example: We need to book a hotel for the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们需要为这次旅行预订一家酒店。

meaning: adj. 习惯的 v. 用（use的过去式）
example: I am used to getting up early now.
exampleChinese: 我现在已经习惯早起了。

meaning: n. 新闻，消息
example: The news made everyone smile.
exampleChinese: 这个消息让大家都笑了。

meaning: vt. 筑成池塘 n. 池塘
example: There are small fish in the pond.
exampleChinese: 池塘里有小鱼。

meaning: n. 朋友
example: My best friend sits next to me at school.
exampleChinese: 我最好的朋友在学校坐在我旁边。

meaning: n. 车辆
example: That vehicle is too large for this road.
exampleChinese: 那辆车对这条路来说太大了。

meaning: n. 重量，重力 v. 加重量于
example: The box was light in weight.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子重量很轻。

meaning: n. 香肠
example: He ate a sausage for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 他早餐吃了一根香肠。

meaning: n. 过道，门厅，走廊
example: Please wait in the hall near the door.
exampleChinese: 请在门边的门厅等一下。

meaning: prep. 用 pron. 和…一起， 跟， 同
example: I went to the library with my brother.
exampleChinese: 我和哥哥一起去了图书馆。

meaning: v. 标记 n. 标志
example: Please flag the important page in the book.
exampleChinese: 请把书里重要的那一页标记出来。

meaning: adj. 有趣的
example: This science book is very interesting.
exampleChinese: 这本科普书很有趣。

meaning: n. 总统
example: The president gave a speech on TV.
exampleChinese: 总统在电视上发表了讲话。

meaning: n. 二月
example: My birthday is in February.
exampleChinese: 我的生日在二月。

meaning: n. 未来 adj. 将来的
example: She wants to be a doctor in the future.
exampleChinese: 她将来想当医生。

meaning: n. 衣服
example: His clothes are still wet from the rain.
exampleChinese: 他的衣服被雨淋后还是湿的。

meaning: n. 注意 v. 注重，考虑
example: We must regard safety as the first rule.
exampleChinese: 我们必须把安全视为第一条规则。

meaning: adj. 积极的 n. 主动语态
example: She is active in class and asks many questions.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上很积极，还会问很多问题。

meaning: n. 女士 v. 未击中， 未达到
example: Be careful not to miss the target.
exampleChinese: 小心不要打偏目标。

meaning: adj. 南的 n. 南方人
example: They traveled through southern China last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天他们游览了中国南方。

meaning: adv. 在今晚 n. 今晚
example: We will watch a movie tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们今晚要看电影。

meaning: v. 参加 n. 结合
example: Do you want to join the basketball team?
exampleChinese: 你想加入篮球队吗？

meaning: adv. 无论如何 conj. 无论以何种方式
example: However tired he was, he finished his homework.
exampleChinese: 无论他多累，他还是完成了作业。

meaning: n. 地板，地面 v. 铺地板
example: The kids sat on the floor to play cards.
exampleChinese: 孩子们坐在地板上打牌。

meaning: n. 四分之一 v. 住宿
example: Only a quarter of the cake was left.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕只剩下四分之一了。

meaning: n. 杯子 v. 使成杯状
example: She poured milk into a cup.
exampleChinese: 她把牛奶倒进了一个杯子里。

meaning: n. 机械，机器 v. 用机器制造
example: This machine can wash clothes quickly.
exampleChinese: 这台机器可以很快洗衣服。

meaning: adj. 下雨的
example: It was a cold and rainy morning.
exampleChinese: 那是一个寒冷又下雨的早晨。

meaning: n. 蜡烛 v. 对着光检查
example: There is a candle on the dinner table.
exampleChinese: 餐桌上有一支蜡烛。

meaning: adj. 完整的 v. 完成
example: Please complete your homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭前完成你的作业。

meaning: n. 鸡肉 adj. 鸡肉的
example: We had chicken and rice for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们午饭吃了鸡肉和米饭。

meaning: v. 拿，扛 n. 运载
example: Can you carry this box for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我拿这个箱子吗？

meaning: n. 沙 v. 撒沙于
example: The children played in the sand.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在沙子里玩耍。

meaning: n. 树 v. 把赶上树
example: A tall tree stands by the road.
exampleChinese: 路边立着一棵高树。

meaning: n. 一餐，一顿饭 vi. 进餐
example: We eat our evening meal at six.
exampleChinese: 我们六点吃晚饭。

meaning: n. 狮子
example: The lion slept in the shade.
exampleChinese: 狮子在阴凉处睡觉。

meaning: v. 记录，记载 n. 档案，履历 adj. 创纪录的
example: Please record the meeting time in your notebook.
exampleChinese: 请把会议时间记在你的笔记本上。

meaning: n. 叉 v. 叉起
example: She ate noodles with a fork.
exampleChinese: 她用叉子吃面条。

meaning: v. 完成 n. 结束
example: I need to finish this book today.
exampleChinese: 我今天需要读完这本书。

meaning: v. 开始
example: Let's start the game after class.
exampleChinese: 我们下课后开始游戏吧。

meaning: n. 执照，许可证 v. 许可 vt. 准许
example: You need a license to drive a car.
exampleChinese: 开车需要驾驶执照。

meaning: n. 钢笔 v. 写
example: He signed his name with a blue pen.
exampleChinese: 他用一支蓝色钢笔签了名。

meaning: adj. 低的，浅的 adv. 低声地 n. 低
example: The shelf is too low for the books.
exampleChinese: 这个架子对这些书来说太低了。

meaning: pron. 谁的（疑问代词）
example: Whose bag is on the chair?
exampleChinese: 椅子上的包是谁的？

meaning: n. 同班同学
example: My classmate sits next to me.
exampleChinese: 我的同班同学坐在我旁边。

meaning: n. 动物园
example: We saw pandas at the zoo.
exampleChinese: 我们在动物园看到了熊猫。

meaning: n. 岗位 v. 张贴
example: Please post the notice on the wall.
exampleChinese: 请把通知张贴在墙上。

meaning: n. 队 v. 使合作
example: Our team won the school match.
exampleChinese: 我们队赢了学校的比赛。

meaning: adj. 相同的 pron. 同样的事物或人（通常与the连用） adv. 同样地（通常与the连用）
example: We wear the same school uniform.
exampleChinese: 我们穿着相同的校服。

meaning: aux. 能够 v. 能（can的过去式） modal verb. 能，会，可以〔can 的过去式〕
example: She could swim at age six.
exampleChinese: 她六岁时就会游泳了。

meaning: n. 秘书
example: The secretary answered the phone politely.
exampleChinese: 秘书礼貌地接了电话。

meaning: n. 地方 v. 放置
example: Please place the cup on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把杯子放在桌子上。

meaning: n. 超级市场
example: My mom went to the supermarket after work.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈下班后去了超市。

meaning: n. 噪音 v. 谣传
example: The noise outside kept me awake.
exampleChinese: 外面的噪音让我睡不着。

meaning: n. 楼梯
example: Be careful on the stairs.
exampleChinese: 走楼梯时要小心。

meaning: adj. 北部的 n. 北部方言
example: The northern wind was cold and strong.
exampleChinese: 北风又冷又强。

meaning: n. 领域 v. 担任场外队员 adj. 扫描场
example: She wants to work in the medical field.
exampleChinese: 她想在医疗领域工作。

meaning: n. 教室
example: Our classroom is clean and bright.
exampleChinese: 我们的教室干净又明亮。

meaning: n. 年级 v. 评分
example: My sister is in the seventh grade.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐上七年级。

meaning: v. 烹调，煮 n. 厨师
example: My father can cook simple meals.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸会做简单的饭菜。

meaning: pron. 他（宾格）
example: I saw him at the school gate.
exampleChinese: 我在校门口看见了他。

meaning: n. 移动
example: One wrong move can drop the blocks.
exampleChinese: 一步走错就会让这些积木掉下来。

meaning: n. 洗涤
example: This shirt needs a quick wash.
exampleChinese: 这件衬衫需要快洗一下。

meaning: adj. 阳光充足的，和煦的
example: It is warm and sunny today.
exampleChinese: 今天天气温暖又晴朗。

meaning: n. 玫瑰 adj. 玫瑰花的 vt. 使成玫瑰色，使（面颊）发红
example: She put a red rose in a glass.
exampleChinese: 她把一朵红玫瑰放进玻璃杯里。

meaning: n. 第七 adj. 第七的 adv. 居第七位地
example: Her birthday is on the seventh of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月七日。

meaning: n. 地面 v. 使接触地面 adj. 土地的
example: The ball rolled across the ground.
exampleChinese: 球从地面上滚了过去。

meaning: n. 一百 adj. 一百的 num. 百
example: The jar holds one hundred marbles.
exampleChinese: 这个罐子能装一百颗弹珠。

meaning: n. 领导者
example: Our class leader helped us plan the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们班的领导者帮我们安排了这次旅行。

meaning: n. 故事 vt. 用历史故事画装饰 vi. 说谎
example: My grandmother told me a funny story.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶给我讲了一个有趣的故事。

meaning: n. 鼻子 v. 嗅
example: My nose gets cold in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天我的鼻子会变冷。

meaning: n. 教堂 adj. 教会的 v. 领…到教堂接受宗教仪式
example: The old church stands near the river.
exampleChinese: 那座古老的教堂矗立在河边。

meaning: adv. 也 conj. 并且
example: She can sing and also play the piano.
exampleChinese: 她会唱歌，也会弹钢琴。

meaning: v. 装满，使充满 n. 满足
example: Please fill the bottle with water.
exampleChinese: 请把瓶子装满水。

meaning: n. 沙发
example: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.
exampleChinese: 那只猫正在沙发上睡觉。

meaning: num. 第九 adj. 第九的 n. 九分之一
example: Today is the ninth day of May.
exampleChinese: 今天是五月的第九天。

meaning: n. 公共汽车
example: We take the bus to school every day.
exampleChinese: 我们每天坐公共汽车去上学。

meaning: n. 英寸 v. 使缓慢地移动
example: The picture is only six inch wide.
exampleChinese: 这张图片只有六英寸宽。

meaning: adj. 热的 adv. 热 v. 变热
example: The soup is too hot to drink.
exampleChinese: 这汤太热了，不能喝。

meaning: v. 游戏
example: The children play in the park after school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们放学后在公园里玩。

meaning: n. 邮递员
example: The postman brought a letter this morning.
exampleChinese: 邮递员今天早上送来了一封信。

meaning: v. 接触
example: Do not touch the wet paint.
exampleChinese: 不要碰湿油漆。

meaning: adj. 白色的 n. 白色
example: She wore a white dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条白色的连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: n. 早餐 v. 吃早餐
example: I eat breakfast at seven every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上七点吃早餐。

meaning: n. 目标 v. 提出…作为反对的理由
example: The main object of the game is to score points.
exampleChinese: 这个游戏的主要目标是得分。

meaning: n. 丝绸 adj. 丝的 vi. （玉米）处于长须的阶段中
example: She wore a silk scarf in spring.
exampleChinese: 她在春天戴了一条丝绸围巾。

meaning: aux. 应该 modal verb. 应当
example: You should drink more water.
exampleChinese: 你应该多喝水。

meaning: adj. 便宜的 adv. 便宜地
example: This bag is cheap but strong.
exampleChinese: 这个包很便宜，但很结实。

meaning: adj. 公众的 n. 公众
example: The park is open to the public on weekends.
exampleChinese: 这个公园周末向公众开放。

meaning: prep. 在旁边
example: My bag is beside the chair.
exampleChinese: 我的包在椅子旁边。

meaning: n. 主要部分，要点 adj. 主要的，最重要的
example: The main reason was the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 主要原因是大雨。

meaning: adj. 生气的
example: She was angry about the broken cup.
exampleChinese: 她因为杯子打碎了而生气。

meaning: n. 方法 adj. 使用体验派表演方法的
example: This method helps me learn new words faster.
exampleChinese: 这个方法帮助我更快地学习新单词。

meaning: n. 事故
example: There was a small accident on the road.
exampleChinese: 路上发生了一起小事故。

meaning: n. 夜晚，晚上 adj. 夜晚的
example: We saw many stars in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 我们在夜空中看到了很多星星。

meaning: adv. 结束 prep. 越过 adj. 结束的
example: The game is over now.
exampleChinese: 比赛现在结束了。

meaning: n. 足球 vi. 踢足球
example: The boys are playing football after school.
exampleChinese: 男孩们放学后在踢足球。

meaning: adv. 还 conj. 但是
example: I haven't finished my homework yet.
exampleChinese: 我还没有完成作业。

meaning: n. 蛇 v. 迂回前进
example: A snake moved slowly through the grass.
exampleChinese: 一条蛇缓缓地穿过草地。

meaning: adj. 新鲜的 n. 开始 adv. 刚刚，才
example: The bread is still fresh this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上这面包还是新鲜的。

meaning: v. 想像
example: Can you imagine life without the internet?
exampleChinese: 你能想像没有互联网的生活吗？

meaning: adj. 每天的 n. 平时
example: Walking is part of my everyday routine.
exampleChinese: 散步是我日常生活的一部分。

meaning: adj. 两者之中任一的 prep. 任何一个 conj. 也（用于否定句或否定词组后）
example: I don't like coffee, and my sister doesn't either.
exampleChinese: 我不喜欢咖啡，我妹妹也不喜欢。

meaning: n. 过去 adj. 过去的 prep. 越过
example: We walked past the library in silence.
exampleChinese: 我们默默地走过了图书馆。

meaning: n. 主题 adj. 服从的 v. 使…隶属
example: Math is my favorite subject at school.
exampleChinese: 数学是我在学校最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 女士
example: Miss Chen teaches us English.
exampleChinese: 陈老师教我们英语。

meaning: v. 创造，创作
example: Good teachers create a fun learning space.
exampleChinese: 好老师会创造一个有趣的学习环境。

meaning: prep. 按照（表示方式） adv. 进入 adj. 在里面的
example: Please write the answer in pencil.
exampleChinese: 请用铅笔写答案。

meaning: n. 工人
example: The worker fixed the broken door.
exampleChinese: 那位工人修好了坏掉的门。

meaning: pron. 这些 adj. 这些的
example: These apples are very sweet.
exampleChinese: 这些苹果很甜。

meaning: adj. 固体的 n. 固体
example: Ice is a solid at low temperatures.
exampleChinese: 冰在低温下是固体。

meaning: n. 形状 v. 形成
example: The cloud has the shape of a heart.
exampleChinese: 那朵云有心形的形状。

meaning: n. 家庭作业
example: I finished my homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我在晚饭前完成了家庭作业。

meaning: n. 圣歌 v. 唱
example: We heard the monks chant in the temple.
exampleChinese: 我们听见僧人在寺庙里吟唱。

meaning: n. 关系
example: Trust is important in any relation.
exampleChinese: 信任在任何关系中都很重要。

meaning: n. 日期 v. 过时
example: Please write the date at the top of the page.
exampleChinese: 请把日期写在页面顶部。

meaning: n. 药 v. 使服麻醉药
example: The doctor gave him a drug for the pain.
exampleChinese: 医生给了他一种止痛药。

meaning: n. 碟 v. 电镀
example: She put the cake on a blue plate.
exampleChinese: 她把蛋糕放在一个蓝色的碟子上。

meaning: n. 政策，方针
example: The school has a strict no-phone policy.
exampleChinese: 学校有严格的禁用手机政策。

meaning: n. 海
example: We saw the sun sink into the sea.
exampleChinese: 我们看见太阳落入海中。

meaning: adj. 正确的 v. 复正 n. 正确
example: Your answer is right.
exampleChinese: 你的答案是正确的。

meaning: n. 百分比，百分率 adj. 百分之…的 adv. 以百分之…地
example: Only ten percent of the class was late.
exampleChinese: 全班只有百分之十的人迟到了。

meaning: n. 角落，拐角处 v. 囤积
example: There is a small shop on the corner.
exampleChinese: 拐角处有一家小商店。

meaning: n. 形式，形状 v. 构成，组成
example: Clouds form over the hills in the evening.
exampleChinese: 傍晚时云在山丘上方形成。

meaning: n. 怜悯，同情 v. 对……表示怜悯
example: I felt pity for the lost dog.
exampleChinese: 我对那只走失的狗感到同情。

meaning: n. 午餐 v. 吃午餐
example: We usually eat lunch at noon.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在中午吃午餐。

meaning: n. 毛巾，手巾 v. 用毛巾擦
example: He used a towel to dry his hair.
exampleChinese: 他用毛巾擦干头发。

meaning: adj. 偶数的 adv. 甚至 v. 使平坦
example: Even my little brother could do it.
exampleChinese: 甚至我弟弟都能做到。

meaning: n. 圣诞节
example: We visit our grandparents at Christmas.
exampleChinese: 我们在圣诞节去看望祖父母。

meaning: n. 平日，普通日
example: The bus is crowded on weekday mornings.
exampleChinese: 平日早晨公交车很拥挤。

meaning: adv. 如此，这么 conj. 所以 pron. 这样
example: The bag was heavy, so I put it down.
exampleChinese: 这个包很重，所以我把它放下了。

meaning: adj. 难过的
example: She felt sad after the movie ended.
exampleChinese: 电影结束后她感到很难过。

meaning: adj. 干的 v. 把…弄干 n. 干涸
example: Please dry the dishes after washing them.
exampleChinese: 洗完碗后请把它们擦干。

meaning: n. 花园 v. 栽培花木
example: My grandparents garden in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母在春天栽培花木。

meaning: adj. 微小的
example: A tiny bird sat on the fence.
exampleChinese: 一只小小的鸟停在篱笆上。

meaning: v. 将…装入密封罐中保存 aux. 能 n. 罐头
example: I can swim across the small river.
exampleChinese: 我能游过这条小河。

meaning: n. 英里
example: Our school is one mile from the park.
exampleChinese: 我们学校离公园有一英里。

meaning: n. 加拿大（北美洲国家）
example: My aunt lives in Canada now.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈现在住在加拿大。

meaning: prep. 离开 adv. 切断 adj. 远离的
example: Please turn off the light before you leave.
exampleChinese: 离开前请把灯关掉。

meaning: v. 允许
example: My parents allow me to ride my bike to school.
exampleChinese: 我父母允许我骑自行车上学。

meaning: v. 邀请，招待 n. 邀请
example: I will invite my best friend to dinner.
exampleChinese: 我会邀请我最好的朋友共进晚餐。

meaning: n. 思想 v. 想，思考
example: That thought made me smile.
exampleChinese: 那个想法让我笑了。

meaning: adj. （男子）英俊的
example: The actor looks handsome in the black suit.
exampleChinese: 那位演员穿着黑色西装看起来很英俊。

meaning: n. 家务事
example: We share the housework on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我们在周末分担家务。

meaning: pron. 我自己
example: I made the model plane myself.
exampleChinese: 这个飞机模型是我自己做的。

meaning: n. 四月
example: The flowers bloom in April.
exampleChinese: 这些花在四月开花。

meaning: v. 激增 n. 气球 adj. 像气球般鼓起的
example: The price of eggs began to balloon last month.
exampleChinese: 鸡蛋的价格上个月开始激增。

meaning: n. 天空 v. 把…投向空中
example: The sky is clear after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后天空很晴朗。

meaning: n. 暴风雨 v. 起风暴
example: A strong storm hit the town at night.
exampleChinese: 夜里一场强烈的暴风雨袭击了小镇。

meaning: n. 小点心
example: She ate a biscuit with her tea.
exampleChinese: 她喝茶时吃了一块小点心。

meaning: adv. 向下，下去 adj. 向下的 n. 软毛，绒毛
example: Please sit down and relax.
exampleChinese: 请坐下休息一下。

meaning: n. 亚洲人 adj. 亚洲的
example: She is an Asian student in our class.
exampleChinese: 她是我们班的一名亚洲学生。

meaning: n. 法案 v. 宣布
example: The bill was passed after a long debate.
exampleChinese: 这项法案经过长时间辩论后获得通过。

meaning: v. 欣赏，享受
example: I enjoy reading by the window on rainy days.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在下雨天坐在窗边看书。

meaning: n. 心脏 vt. 鼓励 vi. 结心
example: Running is good for your heart.
exampleChinese: 跑步对你的心脏有好处。

meaning: n. 南方，南边 adv. 在南方 adj. 南的
example: My grandparents live in the south of China.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母住在中国南方。

meaning: adj. 活泼的
example: The lively girl told us a funny story.
exampleChinese: 那个活泼的女孩给我们讲了一个有趣的故事。

meaning: adj. 迅速的，急促的 n. 急流
example: There was a rapid change in the weather.
exampleChinese: 天气发生了迅速的变化。

meaning: n. 青蛙 v. 捕蛙
example: A green frog jumped into the pond.
exampleChinese: 一只绿色的青蛙跳进了池塘。

meaning: n. 控制
example: The driver lost control of the car.
exampleChinese: 司机失去了对汽车的控制。

meaning: n. 牙痛
example: I stayed home because I had a toothache.
exampleChinese: 因为牙痛，我待在家里。

meaning: adj. 聪明的
example: The clever boy solved the math problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 那个聪明的男孩很快解出了这道数学题。

meaning: v. 提高 n. 高地
example: We should raise our hands before speaking.
exampleChinese: 我们发言前应该举手。

meaning: n. 领导 adj. 带头的
example: She took the lead in the class project.
exampleChinese: 她在班级项目中起了带头作用。

meaning: v. 处理 n. 交易
example: I can deal with this problem myself.
exampleChinese: 我可以自己处理这个问题。

meaning: n. 包，包裹 adj. 一揽子的 v. 打包
example: A package arrived at our door this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上一个包裹送到了我们门口。

meaning: pron. 什么 adv. 到什么程度
example: What is your favorite subject?
exampleChinese: 你最喜欢的科目是什么？

meaning: n. 猪 v. 生小猪
example: The pig is sleeping under the tree.
exampleChinese: 那头猪正在树下睡觉。

meaning: n. 头 v. 前进 adj. 头的
example: She nodded her head and smiled.
exampleChinese: 她点了点头，笑了。

meaning: n. 经验
example: Experience taught him to be more careful.
exampleChinese: 经验教会了他要更加小心。

meaning: v. 惩罚
example: Teachers should not punish students unfairly.
exampleChinese: 老师不应该不公平地惩罚学生。

meaning: v. 开发
example: The company plans to develop a new app.
exampleChinese: 这家公司计划开发一款新应用。

meaning: n. 生日，诞辰
example: We made a cake for Mom's birthday.
exampleChinese: 我们为妈妈的生日做了一个蛋糕。

meaning: n. 科学家
example: The scientist worked late in the lab.
exampleChinese: 那位科学家在实验室工作到很晚。

meaning: v. 失败，不及格 n. 不及格
example: Don't fail the test because of carelessness.
exampleChinese: 不要因为粗心而考试不及格。

meaning: n. 摇摆 adj. 旋转的
example: The swing in the park moves in the wind.
exampleChinese: 公园里的秋千在风中摇摆。

meaning: pron. 每个人
example: Everyone in our class likes the new teacher.
exampleChinese: 我们班每个人都喜欢这位新老师。

meaning: pron. 这 adv. 这样地
example: This is my favorite book.
exampleChinese: 这是我最喜欢的书。

meaning: n. 牛奶 v. 榨取
example: I drink a glass of milk every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上喝一杯牛奶。

meaning: n. 浪费 adj. 废弃的
example: Food waste is a big problem.
exampleChinese: 食物浪费是一个大问题。

meaning: adj. 缺席的 v. 使缺席
example: She was absent from school yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天缺席了学校的课程。

meaning: n. 明天
example: Tomorrow is my brother's birthday.
exampleChinese: 明天是我弟弟的生日。

meaning: n. 因特网
example: We use the Internet to find information.
exampleChinese: 我们用因特网查找信息。

meaning: n. 牙刷
example: My toothbrush is blue.
exampleChinese: 我的牙刷是蓝色的。

meaning: adj. 近的 adv. 近 prep. 靠近
example: The supermarket is near my home.
exampleChinese: 超市在我家附近。

meaning: n. 身体 v. 赋以形体
example: Exercise is good for your body.
exampleChinese: 锻炼对你的身体有好处。

meaning: n. 婴儿，婴孩 v. 纵容，娇纵 adj. 婴儿的
example: The baby is sleeping in the small bed.
exampleChinese: 婴儿正在小床上睡觉。

meaning: n. 天花板
example: A lamp hangs from the ceiling.
exampleChinese: 一盏灯挂在天花板上。

meaning: adj. 诚实的，实在的
example: He is honest and never tells lies.
exampleChinese: 他很诚实，从不说谎。

meaning: adj. 中间的，中部的 n. 中间，中央
example: She sat in the middle of the room.
exampleChinese: 她坐在房间中央。

meaning: adv. 离去，离开 adj. 不在的
example: My parents are away this weekend.
exampleChinese: 我父母这个周末不在家。

meaning: n. 意义 adj. 意味深长的 v. 意味
example: I don't know the meaning of this word.
exampleChinese: 我不知道这个单词的意思。

meaning: n. 晚上 adj. 在晚上的 int. 晚上好（等于good evening）
example: We often take a walk in the evening.
exampleChinese: 我们经常在晚上散步。

meaning: adj. 美丽的
example: The garden looks beautiful in spring.
exampleChinese: 花园在春天看起来很美丽。

meaning: n. 礼物 v. 赋予
example: This gift is for your birthday.
exampleChinese: 这份礼物是送给你生日的。

meaning: n. 猪肉 vt. 与女子性交
example: We had pork and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了猪肉和米饭。

meaning: v. 试图，努力 n. 尝试
example: I will try to finish my homework early.
exampleChinese: 我会努力早点完成作业。

meaning: n. 猴子 v. 胡闹
example: The monkey climbed the tree quickly.
exampleChinese: 那只猴子很快爬上了树。

meaning: adj. 著名的
example: This writer is famous around the world.
exampleChinese: 这位作家在全世界都很著名。

meaning: adj. 绿色的 n. 绿色 v. 使…变绿色
example: The leaves turn green in spring.
exampleChinese: 树叶在春天变绿。

meaning: n. 路线，航线 v. 排成一行
example: This bus line goes to the airport.
exampleChinese: 这条公交线路通往机场。

meaning: n. 工厂
example: My uncle works in a car factory.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔在一家汽车工厂工作。

meaning: n. 星期六
example: We usually clean the house on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在星期六打扫房子。

meaning: n. 麻烦
example: If you lie again, you will be in trouble.
exampleChinese: 如果你再说谎，你就会有麻烦。

meaning: adj. 仔细的
example: Be careful when you cross the street.
exampleChinese: 过马路时要小心。

meaning: n. 卷心菜，甘蓝菜，洋白菜
example: She bought a fresh cabbage at the market.
exampleChinese: 她在市场买了一个新鲜的卷心菜。

meaning: n. 胜利者
example: The winner held up the gold cup.
exampleChinese: 获胜者举起了金杯。

meaning: v. 保护，防卫
example: Trees protect the soil from heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 树木保护土壤不受大雨冲刷。

meaning: v. 改正 adj. 正确的
example: Please correct the mistake in this sentence.
exampleChinese: 请改正这个句子里的错误。

meaning: v. 需要
example: These plants want more sunlight.
exampleChinese: 这些植物需要更多阳光。

meaning: v. 使休息，使轻松 n. 休息，静止
example: You should rest after the long walk.
exampleChinese: 长时间步行后你应该休息。

meaning: adj. 困难的
example: This math problem is very difficult.
exampleChinese: 这道数学题很难。

meaning: n. 口音 v. 强调
example: She speaks English with an American accent.
exampleChinese: 她说英语时带有美国口音。

meaning: pron. 自己
example: One should believe in oneself.
exampleChinese: 一个人应该相信自己。

meaning: v. 上煤 n. 煤
example: The train carried coal to the city.
exampleChinese: 火车把煤运到了城市。

meaning: v. 铸造（货币） n. 硬币
example: I found a coin under the sofa.
exampleChinese: 我在沙发下面找到了一枚硬币。

meaning: adj. 实际的 adv. 真正地 n. 现实
example: This is the real reason I came early.
exampleChinese: 这才是我早来的真正原因。

meaning: adv. 可是，虽然 conj. 虽然 prep. 但
example: The coat is old, though it still looks nice.
exampleChinese: 这件外套虽然旧了，可是看起来仍然不错。

meaning: v. 划分 n. 分水岭
example: Please divide the cake into six pieces.
exampleChinese: 请把蛋糕分成六块。

meaning: n. 叶子 v. 生叶
example: A yellow leaf fell onto my book.
exampleChinese: 一片黄叶落在我的书上。

meaning: adj. 第四的，第四个的 n. 第四，月的第四日 num. 第四
example: She finished fourth in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛中得了第四名。

meaning: n. 治疗，疗法
example: The doctor started treatment right away.
exampleChinese: 医生马上开始了治疗。

meaning: n. 技能，技巧
example: Cooking is a useful skill.
exampleChinese: 做饭是一项有用的技能。

meaning: pron. 他们的，她们的
example: Their classroom is on the third floor.
exampleChinese: 他们的教室在三楼。

meaning: n. 危险
example: The thin ice is a real danger.
exampleChinese: 薄冰是真正的危险。

meaning: n. 交叉，十字 v. 交叉 adj. 交叉的，相反的
example: Be careful when you cross the street.
exampleChinese: 你过马路时要小心。

meaning: n. 要点 v. 指向
example: He used a stick to point at the map.
exampleChinese: 他用一根棍子指着地图。

meaning: adv. 现在 adj. 现在的 conj. 由于
example: I need to leave now.
exampleChinese: 我现在得走了。

meaning: n. 巫术 adj. 不可思议的
example: The trick looked like magic to me.
exampleChinese: 那个戏法在我看来像魔术一样。

meaning: aux. 将，将要 v. will的过去式
example: I would help if I had more time.
exampleChinese: 如果我有更多时间，我会帮忙的。

meaning: n. 电影
example: We watched an old film at the cinema.
exampleChinese: 我们在电影院看了一部老电影。

meaning: adv. 在楼下 adj. 楼下的 n. 楼下
example: My shoes are downstairs by the door.
exampleChinese: 我的鞋子在楼下门边。

meaning: conj. 也不 adv. 两个都不 adj. 两者都不的
example: Neither answer is correct.
exampleChinese: 两个答案都不对。

meaning: adj. 下流的，卑鄙的 v. 弄脏
example: My shoes got dirty in the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的鞋子在雨里弄脏了。

meaning: v. 呼吸
example: It was hard to breathe in the smoky room.
exampleChinese: 在那个烟雾弥漫的房间里很难呼吸。

meaning: n. 脖子 v. 搂著脖子亲吻
example: The scarf around my neck is very warm.
exampleChinese: 我脖子上的围巾很暖和。

meaning: n. 影响
example: Her teacher had a strong influence on her future plans.
exampleChinese: 她的老师对她未来的计划有很大影响。

meaning: adj. 贫穷的
example: The poor family lived in a small house.
exampleChinese: 那个贫穷的家庭住在一间小房子里。

meaning: n. 星期日
example: We usually visit Grandma on Sunday.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在星期日去看望奶奶。

meaning: n. 比特（二进位制信息单位） vt. 控制 adj. 很小的
example: My phone has only a small bit of free space left.
exampleChinese: 我的手机只剩下一点点可用空间。

meaning: n. 鸟 v. 向…喝倒彩
example: A small bird sang outside my window.
exampleChinese: 一只小鸟在我的窗外歌唱。

meaning: v. 发生
example: Accidents can happen at any time.
exampleChinese: 事故可能在任何时候发生。

meaning: adj. 美味的
example: This soup is delicious on a cold day.
exampleChinese: 这汤在寒冷的日子里喝起来很美味。

meaning: n. 操作
example: The safe operation of the machine is important.
exampleChinese: 机器的安全操作很重要。

meaning: n. 联营
example: The companies formed a pool to share costs.
exampleChinese: 这些公司组成了联营来分摊成本。

meaning: v. 滑冰 n. 溜冰
example: They skate on the lake every winter.
exampleChinese: 他们每年冬天都在湖上滑冰。

meaning: adv. 错误地 n. 坏事 adj. 错误的
example: The answer is wrong.
exampleChinese: 这个答案是错误的。

meaning: n. 一天 adv. 每天 adj. 日间的
example: I read for one hour every day.
exampleChinese: 我每天阅读一小时。

meaning: adj. 金色的，黄金般的
example: The field turned golden in the autumn sun.
exampleChinese: 田野在秋日阳光下变成了金色。

meaning: n. 借口 v. 原谅
example: Please excuse my mistake.
exampleChinese: 请原谅我的错误。

meaning: adj. 寂寞的 n. 孤独者
example: He felt lonely in the new city.
exampleChinese: 他在这座新城市里感到很寂寞。

meaning: adj. 沉默的 n. 无声电影
example: The room became silent after the bell rang.
exampleChinese: 铃响后，房间里变得安静无声。

meaning: n. 诗
example: She wrote a short poem for her mother.
exampleChinese: 她为妈妈写了一首短诗。

meaning: adj. 晚的 adv. 晚
example: I was late for class this morning.
exampleChinese: 我今天早上上课迟到了。

meaning: n. 病， 疾病 vt. 传染
example: Doctors are working to stop the disease.
exampleChinese: 医生们正在努力阻止这种疾病。

meaning: n. 铃，钟 v. 装钟于
example: The bell rang at noon.
exampleChinese: 铃在中午响了。

meaning: n. 实验室
example: We did the test in the lab.
exampleChinese: 我们在实验室里做了这个测试。

meaning: n. 孙子
example: Her grandson visits every Sunday.
exampleChinese: 她的孙子每个星期天都来探望。

meaning: adj. 受欢迎的 n. 欢迎
example: Your ideas are always welcome here.
exampleChinese: 你的想法在这里总是受欢迎的。

meaning: n. 女儿 adj. 女儿的
example: His daughter started school this year.
exampleChinese: 他的女儿今年开始上学了。

meaning: n. 肉，肉类（食用）
example: We had meat and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了肉和米饭。

meaning: n. 道路
example: A narrow path leads to the lake.
exampleChinese: 一条狭窄的小路通向湖边。

meaning: adj. 两个的 adv. 并 pron. 双方都

exampleChinese: 两个答案都对。

exampleChinese: 老师进来时请站起来。

exampleChinese: 最好的事情是寻求帮助。

exampleChinese: 我叔叔去年去了印度。

exampleChinese: 请选择一个靠窗的座位。

exampleChinese: 这个地区在晚上很安静。

exampleChinese: 你能给我说明一下这条规则吗？

exampleChinese: 她在学校里很善于交际。

exampleChinese: 我们必须先权衡风险。

meaning: n. 九，九个 num. 九 adj. 九的

exampleChinese: 蛋糕上有九支蜡烛。

exampleChinese: 我的第一份工作是在一家小商店。

meaning: n. 博物馆
example: We visited the museum on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期六参观了博物馆。

meaning: n. 里面 adj. 里面的 adv. 在里面

exampleChinese: 钥匙在抽屉里面。

meaning: adj. 有耐心的 n. 病人

exampleChinese: 我们的老师对新学生很有耐心。

meaning: n. 番茄
example: She put a sliced tomato on the sandwich.
exampleChinese: 她在三明治里放了一片番茄。

meaning: adj. 不同的
example: The two bags are different in color.
exampleChinese: 这两个包颜色不同。

meaning: n. 单词 v. 用言辞表达

exampleChinese: 我在词典里查了这个单词。

exampleChinese: 服务台的那位女士给了我一张地图。

exampleChinese: 孩子们正在公园里放风筝。

meaning: n. 外地人
example: As a foreigner, he asked for help at the station.
exampleChinese: 作为一个外国人，他在车站寻求帮助。

meaning: adv. 从未
example: I have never seen snow in July.
exampleChinese: 我从未在七月见过雪。

meaning: n. 垃圾 v. 拒绝

exampleChinese: 她不得不礼貌地拒绝邀请。

meaning: n. 高温 v. 使激动
example: The summer heat made everyone tired.
exampleChinese: 夏天的高温让每个人都很疲惫。

meaning: n. 火 v. 点燃
example: We sat near the fire to keep warm.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在火旁边取暖。

meaning: adv. 或许 n. 假定
example: Perhaps we can go after lunch.
exampleChinese: 或许我们可以午饭后去。

meaning: n. 老板 v. 指挥，调遣
example: My boss asked me to finish the report today.
exampleChinese: 我的老板让我今天完成这份报告。

meaning: n. 供给，补给 v. 供给，提供

exampleChinese: 树木在夏天提供阴凉。

meaning: n. 袜子（sock的复数）
example: My socks are still wet from the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的袜子被雨淋后还是湿的。

meaning: n. 昨天
example: Yesterday was rainy and cold.
exampleChinese: 昨天又下雨又冷。

meaning: adj. 那些的 pron. 那些（that的复数）
example: Those shoes look very comfortable.
exampleChinese: 那些鞋子看起来很舒服。

meaning: n. 成功，成就

exampleChinese: 努力工作是成功的关键。

meaning: n. 网站（全球资讯网的主机站）
example: I found the school calendar on the website.
exampleChinese: 我在这个网站上找到了学校日历。

meaning: adj. 相似的 n. 类似物
example: Your bag looks similar to mine.
exampleChinese: 你的包看起来和我的很相似。

meaning: n. 钢铁 v. 钢化 adj. 钢制的

exampleChinese: 这座桥是用钢铁建成的。

meaning: adv. 此外 prep. 除…之外

exampleChinese: 除了数学，她还喜欢美术。

meaning: adj. 全部的 adv. 全然地 n. 全部
example: All the lights were on.
exampleChinese: 所有的灯都亮着。

meaning: n. 建议

exampleChinese: 谢谢你的建议。

meaning: n. 音乐
example: Soft music filled the room.
exampleChinese: 轻柔的音乐充满了房间。

meaning: n. 实践 v. 练习

exampleChinese: 我每天晚上练习弹钢琴。

meaning: num. 八 adj. 八的 n. 八字形

exampleChinese: 碗里有八个苹果。

meaning: n. 七十 adj. 七十的
example: My grandfather is seventy this year.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷今年七十岁。

meaning: n. 担心
example: His biggest worry is the exam tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 他最大的担心是明天的考试。

meaning: n. 惊奇 v. 怀疑 adj. 奇妙的

exampleChinese: 我想知道公交车为什么晚了。

meaning: adj. 每一的，每个的

exampleChinese: 每个学生都需要一本笔记本。

meaning: n. 屏，幕 v. 筛
example: The movie started on the big screen.
exampleChinese: 电影在大屏幕上开始播放了。

meaning: n. 母鸡

exampleChinese: 那只母鸡今天早上下了一个蛋。

meaning: n. 面包 v. 在…上洒面包屑
example: I ate bread and soup for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了面包和汤。

meaning: n. 人
example: Each person got a free ticket.
exampleChinese: 每个人都得到了一张免费票。

meaning: pron. 他们自己
example: The children cleaned the room themselves.
exampleChinese: 孩子们自己打扫了房间。

meaning: v. 用粉笔写 n. 粉笔 adj. 用粉笔写的

exampleChinese: 请用粉笔在黑板上写字。

meaning: n. 奶酪 v. 停止 adj. 叛变的
example: This sandwich has cheese and tomato.
exampleChinese: 这个三明治里有奶酪和西红柿。

meaning: adj. 欲睡的

exampleChinese: 我午饭后觉得很困。

meaning: adj. 十六的 num. 十六
example: My sister is sixteen this year.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐今年十六岁。

meaning: n. 薄烤饼 vi. 平坠着陆 vt. 使平坠著陆

exampleChinese: 我们早餐吃了薄烤饼。

meaning: n. 吨
example: The truck can carry one ton of sand.
exampleChinese: 这辆卡车可以运载一吨沙子。

meaning: n. 头发 vt. 除去…的毛发 vi. 生长毛发

exampleChinese: 她的头发很长。

meaning: n. 奶奶

exampleChinese: 我奶奶讲有趣的故事。

meaning: n. 云 v. 使混乱
example: A dark cloud moved across the sky.
exampleChinese: 一朵乌云飘过天空。

meaning: adv. 很少
example: He seldom eats fast food.
exampleChinese: 他很少吃快餐。

meaning: n. （美）电话 v. 打电话
example: I will telephone my aunt tonight.
exampleChinese: 我今晚要给姑妈打电话。

meaning: n. 属，种 v. 使参加比赛
example: The children race across the field.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在田野上赛跑。

meaning: n. 计算机
example: My computer is on the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的电脑在书桌上。

meaning: v. 听，倾听
example: Please listen to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 请听老师讲。

meaning: n. 贸易，交易 v. 交易，买卖
example: The two countries trade oil and rice.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家交易石油和大米。

meaning: aux. 可以，能够 modal verb. 可能 n. 山楂花
example: You may sit here.
exampleChinese: 你可以坐在这里。

meaning: pron. 每件事物
example: Everything is ready for the party.
exampleChinese: 聚会的一切都准备好了。

meaning: adv. 代替
example: We stayed home instead.
exampleChinese: 我们反而待在家里。

meaning: pron. 我们的
example: These books are ours.
exampleChinese: 这些书是我们的。

meaning: n. 语法
example: Good grammar makes your writing clear.
exampleChinese: 好的语法会让你的写作更清楚。

meaning: adv. 如何 n. 方法
example: Can you show me how to use this camera?
exampleChinese: 你能告诉我如何使用这台相机吗？

meaning: pron. 她（主格） n. 女人
example: She is my best friend.
exampleChinese: 她是我最好的朋友。

meaning: n. 篮子 vt. 装入篮
example: She put the apples in a basket.
exampleChinese: 她把苹果放进了一个篮子里。

meaning: conj. 和，与
example: Tom and Lucy walk to school together.
exampleChinese: 汤姆和露西一起走路去学校。

meaning: v. 使比赛 n. 比赛，竞赛
example: Our team won the match yesterday.
exampleChinese: 我们队昨天赢了比赛。

meaning: adj. 完美的 v. 使完美 n. 完成式
example: The sky was a perfect blue.
exampleChinese: 天空是完美的蓝色。

meaning: n. 发烧，发热 vt. 使发烧 vi. 发烧

exampleChinese: 他因为发烧而待在家里。

meaning: adv. 特别
example: I especially like this picture.
exampleChinese: 我特别喜欢这张图片。

meaning: n. 难题 adj. 成问题的

exampleChinese: 这道数学难题很难。

meaning: int. 再见 n. 轮空 adj. 次要的

exampleChinese: 我挥手向老师说再见。

meaning: n. 物理学

exampleChinese: 她在学校学习物理学。

meaning: prep. 在…之间 adv. 在中间

exampleChinese: 球滚到了两把椅子之间。

meaning: n. 灯 vt. 照亮 vi. 发亮

exampleChinese: 我的书桌上有一盏灯。

meaning: n. （水果）汁，液
example: Would you like some orange juice?
exampleChinese: 你想喝点橙汁吗？

meaning: n. 动物 adj. 动物的
example: The panda is a gentle animal.
exampleChinese: 熊猫是一种温和的动物。

meaning: n. 成员

exampleChinese: 她是音乐社团的一名成员。

meaning: n. 胶带 v. 录音
example: Please use tape to fix the torn page.
exampleChinese: 请用胶带把破掉的书页粘好。

exampleChinese: 撒谎后他感到羞愧。

meaning: adj. 黑色的 n. 黑色 v. 使变黑

exampleChinese: 他穿着一件黑色外套去学校。

meaning: n. 天堂

exampleChinese: 有些人相信天堂是一个宁静的地方。

meaning: prep. 低于，少于 adv. 在下面 adj. 下面的
example: The cat is sleeping under the table.
exampleChinese: 猫正在桌子下面睡觉。

meaning: pron. 我们的

exampleChinese: 我们的教室在二楼。

meaning: adj. 国家的 n. 国民

exampleChinese: 国旗正在学校上空飘扬。

meaning: n. 金属 v. 以金属覆盖 adj. 金属制的

exampleChinese: 这个勺子是金属做的。

meaning: adj. 准备好 n. 现款 adv. 迅速地

exampleChinese: 我准备好参加数学考试了。

meaning: v. 庆祝
example: We will celebrate her birthday tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们今晚要庆祝她的生日。

meaning: n. 十五 adj. 十五的
example: My little cousin is fifteen this year.
exampleChinese: 我的小表弟今年十五岁。

meaning: n. 教练 v. 训练
example: Our basketball coach is very patient.
exampleChinese: 我们的篮球教练很有耐心。

meaning: adj. 酸的 v. 发酵 n. 酸味

exampleChinese: 这个柠檬吃起来很酸。

meaning: adj. 盲目的 adv. 盲目地 n. 掩饰，借口

exampleChinese: 那位盲人慢慢地穿过街道。

exampleChinese: 她的卧室很小，但很整洁。

meaning: n. 巧克力，巧克力糖 adj. 巧克力色的

exampleChinese: 我在商店买了一块巧克力。

meaning: n. 玩具 v. 玩弄 adj. 作为玩具的
example: The child hugged his new toy.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子抱着他的新玩具。

meaning: n. 英镑 v. 捣烂
example: This book costs one pound.
exampleChinese: 这本书价值一英镑。

meaning: n. 两倍 adj. 双重的 v. 加倍，加倍努力
example: The new room is double the size of mine.
exampleChinese: 新房间的大小是我房间的两倍。

meaning: n. 老虎
example: The tiger slept under the tree.
exampleChinese: 老虎在树下睡觉。

meaning: adj. 坚强的 adv. 强劲地
example: She is strong enough to carry the box.
exampleChinese: 她足够强壮，能搬起这个箱子。

meaning: adj. 容易的 adv. 不费力地 vi. 停止划桨

exampleChinese: 这道题对我来说很容易。

meaning: n. 电视，电视机

exampleChinese: 我的祖父母每天晚上都看电视。

meaning: n. 想法

exampleChinese: 那是个很棒的想法。

meaning: adv. 一起 adj. 新潮的
example: We walked to school together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起走路去学校。

meaning: art. 这 adv. 更加（用于比较级
example: The more you read, the better you write.
exampleChinese: 你读得越多，写得就越好。

meaning: n. 恋爱 v. 爱，热爱
example: I love reading by the window on rainy days.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在下雨天坐在窗边读书。

meaning: n. 刷子 v. 刷
example: She uses a small brush to clean her shoes.
exampleChinese: 她用一把小刷子刷她的鞋。

meaning: n. 卡车 v. 驾驶卡车 adj. （美）运货汽车的

exampleChinese: 一辆红色卡车停在商店外面。

meaning: n. 口，嘴 v. 做作地说，装腔作势地说

exampleChinese: 宝宝张开嘴吃一勺米饭。

meaning: adj. 厌恶的 n. 病人 v. 使狗去咬
example: I feel sick after eating too much cake.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕吃太多后，我觉得不舒服。

meaning: adv. 只，仅仅 adj. 唯一的，仅有的 conj. 但是
example: This is the only seat left on the bus.
exampleChinese: 这是公交车上仅剩的一个座位。

meaning: adv. 快
example: The bus will be here soon.
exampleChinese: 公交车很快就会到。

meaning: adj. 友好的 adv. 友善地
example: Our new neighbor is very friendly.
exampleChinese: 我们的新邻居非常友好。

meaning: n. 墙壁，围墙 v. 用墙围住 adj. 墙壁的

exampleChinese: 墙上有一个钟。

meaning: adj. 疲软的

exampleChinese: 长跑后，我的腿感觉很无力。

meaning: n. 钱
example: She saves her money in a small box.
exampleChinese: 她把钱存放在一个小盒子里。

meaning: n. （英）铁路 vi. 乘火车旅行
example: The railway connects the two cities.
exampleChinese: 这条铁路连接着这两座城市。

meaning: n. 工具，用具 v. 使用工具
example: This tool helps me open the box safely.
exampleChinese: 这个工具帮助我安全地打开盒子。

meaning: adj. 粗心的
example: He was careless and left his bag on the train.
exampleChinese: 他很粗心，把包落在火车上了。

meaning: adj. 有帮助的
example: Your notes were very helpful before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前，你的笔记很有帮助。

meaning: n. 五，五个 adj. 五的
example: There are five apples on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有五个苹果。

meaning: adj. 欧洲的 n. 欧洲人
example: She met a European student at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校遇到了一位欧洲学生。

meaning: n. 术语 v. 把…叫做
example: This term is common in science books.
exampleChinese: 这个术语在科学书中很常见。

meaning: adj. 黄色的 n. 黄色 v. 使变黄或发黄
example: The yellow flower stands out in the garden.
exampleChinese: 那朵黄色的花在花园里很显眼。

meaning: n. 镜子 v. 反射
example: I looked in the mirror before leaving home.
exampleChinese: 出门前，我照了照镜子。

meaning: n. 条件 v. 决定
example: A good condition for joining the team is regular practice.
exampleChinese: 加入这个队的一个好条件是定期训练。

meaning: n. 位置，方位 v. 安置
example: Please position the chair near the window.
exampleChinese: 请把椅子安置在窗户旁边。

meaning: v. 捕鱼，钓鱼 n. 鱼，鱼类
example: We fish in the lake every summer.
exampleChinese: 我们每年夏天都在湖里钓鱼。

meaning: v. 统治

exampleChinese: 那位老国王过去曾明智地统治这个国家。

meaning: int. 哎呀！什么？ adv. 为什么
example: Why are you crying outside the classroom?
exampleChinese: 你为什么在教室外面哭？

meaning: n. 访问
example: Her visit to the museum lasted two hours.
exampleChinese: 她参观博物馆的访问持续了两个小时。

meaning: n. 勇气
example: It took courage to speak in front of the class.
exampleChinese: 在全班同学面前发言需要勇气。

meaning: n. 洋娃娃 v. 把…打扮得花枝招展
example: The little girl hugged her doll at bedtime.
exampleChinese: 小女孩睡觉前抱着她的洋娃娃。

meaning: n. 五月
example: My birthday is in May this year.
exampleChinese: 我今年的生日在五月。

meaning: n. 春天 adj. 春天的 v. 生长
example: Flowers spring up fast after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后花儿长得很快。

meaning: adv. 不 adj. 没有 abbr. 数字（number）
example: There is no milk left in the fridge.
exampleChinese: 冰箱里没有牛奶了。

meaning: n. 欢乐，快乐 v. 欣喜
example: The children's laughter filled the room with joy.
exampleChinese: 孩子们的笑声让房间充满了欢乐。

meaning: v. 等候 n. 等待
example: Thank you for your wait at the bus stop.
exampleChinese: 谢谢你在公交车站的等待。

meaning: n. 象
example: The elephant used its trunk to pick up water.
exampleChinese: 大象用鼻子吸起了水。

meaning: n. 挑战 v. 敢冒
example: I dare to try the high diving board.
exampleChinese: 我敢尝试那个高跳板。

meaning: adj. 一般的，普通的 n. 一般

exampleChinese: 这是对一个常见问题的一般回答。

meaning: n. 片刻，瞬间，时刻
example: For a moment, the whole room became quiet.
exampleChinese: 有那么一瞬间，整个房间都安静了下来。

meaning: adj. 明智的 v. 使知道
example: It was wise to bring an umbrella today.
exampleChinese: 今天带伞是明智的。

meaning: n. 玻璃 v. 反映
example: The glass on the door is very clean.
exampleChinese: 门上的玻璃非常干净。

meaning: n. 菜单
example: I looked at the menu before ordering lunch.
exampleChinese: 我点午饭前先看了菜单。

meaning: adj. 广泛的 adv. 广泛地 n. 大千世界
example: The river is wide in summer.
exampleChinese: 这条河在夏天很宽。

meaning: n. 科目 v. 追赶
example: Math is my favorite course this term.
exampleChinese: 数学是我这学期最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 先生
